recommendations.title: Everybody Go Home!
recommendations.overview: When Italy surrenders to the Allies, part of the Italian army is dispersed and soldiers begin to return to their homes.

recommendations.title: Bread, Love and Dreams
recommendations.overview: When a veteran marshal is sent to a small town, he quickly falls for two women: a midwife and an earthy young woman nicknamed "Frisky".

recommendations.title: Don Camillo in Moscow
recommendations.overview: Priest Don Camillo blackmails his friendly rival Peppone into letting him join a Communist delegation visiting the Soviet Union.

recommendations.title: The Scopone Game
recommendations.overview: An aging American millionairess journeys to Rome each year with her chauffeur George to play the card game scopone with destitute Peppino and his wife Antonia.

recommendations.title: Asterix & Obelix: Mission Cleopatra
recommendations.overview: History's favorite Gauls assist Queen Cleopatra when she wagers that the Egyptian people can build a palace for Julius Caesar in just three months.

recommendations.title: Harold and Maude
recommendations.overview: A deadpan young man obsessed with death meets an eccentric septuagenarian who teaches him to live life to the fullest.

recommendations.title: The House
recommendations.overview: Across different eras, a poor family, an anxious developer and a fed-up landlady become tied to the same mysterious house in this animated dark comedy.
recommendations.director: Paloma Baeza, Emma De Swaef, Marc James Roels, Niki Lindroth von Bahr

recommendations.title: CJ7
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Drama, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A poor construction worker, who struggles to keep his son in private school, mistakes an orb he finds in a junkjard for a toy which proves to be much, much more once the young boy starts to play with it.

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
recommendations.overview: The Grinch decides to rob Whoville of Christmas - but a dash of kindness from little Cindy Lou Who and her family may be enough to melt his heart...
